name: @companyhelm/runner
description: Run the CompanyHelm runner in fully isolated Docker sandboxes.

scripts.test:unit: npm run build && vitest run tests/unit
scripts.test:integration: npm run build && vitest run tests/integration
scripts.test:system:device-auth: npm run build && COMPANYHELM_RUN_MANUAL_DEVICE_AUTH_TEST=1 vitest run --reporter=verbose tests/system/codex-device-auth.system.test.ts
scripts.generate:codex-app-server: docker run --rm --user "$(id -u):$(id -g)" -e CODEX_HOME=/workspace/node_modules/.cache/codex -v "$PWD:/workspace" -w /workspace companyhelm/runner:$(tr -d '[:space:]' < RUNTIME_IMAGE_VERSION) bash -lc 'mkdir -p /workspace/node_modules/.cache/codex; source "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; codex app-server generate-ts --out src/generated/codex-app-server'
